name: inline-exec
description: Write inline code to a temp file and execute it with the appropriate runner (go, node, python3, tsx), or run a Go package directly with --pkg and optional build flags.

parameters.name: runner
parameters.description: Runner program: go, node, python3, cargo, tsx, or a custom runner path

parameters.name: code_or_pkg
parameters.description: Inline code to execute; or with --pkg, the Go package path (e.g. ./cmd/task/)

parameters.name: --file, -f
parameters.description: Read code from a file instead of inline argument

parameters.name: --ext, -e
parameters.description: File extension (e.g. .go, .js, .py); auto-detected from runner if omitted

parameters.name: --keep
parameters.description: Keep the temp file after execution for inspection

parameters.name: --pkg, --package
parameters.description: Run a Go package directly (e.g. ./cmd/task/) instead of inline code; supports --go-flags and -- for program arguments

parameters.name: --go-flags
parameters.description: Go build flags like "-tags debug"; only used with --pkg

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses the heredoc file creation + execution + cleanup pattern into a single step, and the --pkg flag replaces repeated cd + timeout + go run flag exploration steps, saving 2-3 agent steps per invocation.
